column7: Mecc Alte ECO and ECP series alternators cover a range of industrial and marine-rated synchronous alternators from 17.5 to 350 kVA output. Available in both 50 Hz and 60 Hz frequencies, these 4-pole alternators support 3-phase and 1-phase outputs, and offer high efficiency, strong build quality, and compliance with international certifications such as CE and UL.
